checks.name: active_episode_death_continuity
checks.detail: Bridge-owned Mineflayer death/respawn counters are reset-bound, propagated through observations and canonical events, required by terminal verification, and independently enforced over the active interval.

offline_place_requested_item_equip_gate.scope: generic Mineflayer place bridge requested-item selection, equip, and observed postcondition only

offline_place_target_occupancy_gate.scope: strict-M4 planner contract, pre-execution ActionVerifier, and generic Mineflayer place target preflight

offline_task_world_state_reconciliation_.scope: strict-M4 pre-goal reconciliation plus criterion-specific TaskSystem machine-evidence evaluation

offline_typed_schema_rejection_recovery_.scope: strict-M4 bounded next-cycle recovery for typed fail-closed Planner schema rejection
required_offline_proof: preserve the same autonomous goal and task frontier for one bounded next-cycle replan after the typed numeric schema rejection
accept no malformed task or action from the rejected response
leave repeated invalid output bounded and fail closed
preserve deadlines and non-M4 planner behavior

exact_probe_9_shape_replay.goal: Gather 6 oak logs for tools and shelter

offline_opportunity_trigger_type_gate.scope: strict-M4 subtask opportunity-trigger metadata validation plus defensive TaskSystem consumption

exact_probe_10_shape_replay.goal: Collect coal or charcoal for torches

offline_expected_drop_pickup_postconditi.scope: strict-M4 Mineflayer dig pickup collection and expected-drop inventory postcondition

exact_probe_11_shape_replay.goal: Gather 6 oak logs for tools and shelter
exact_probe_11_shape_replay.replay_error: expected block drop was not acquired

offline_pickup_collection_completion_gro.required_control: ground collector completion in expected inventory acquisition and a reachable machine-observed final state

offline_place_target_player_occupancy_ga.required_control: reject or avoid strict-M4 place targets intersecting the player collision cells before placeBlock and request a bounded adjacent-position replan

offline_dig_required_tool_equip_gate.goal: Mine 12 cobblestone for stone tools and furnace
offline_dig_required_tool_equip_gate.required_control: strict M4 must equip and machine-confirm a block-compatible harvest tool before dig mutation, then preserve the existing expected-drop postcondition

offline_deadline_bound_navigation_bridge.required_control: restore a fresh bridge connection for the next cycle without replaying the timed-out action or weakening either deadline

offline_place_replan_feedback_grounding_.goal: Place crafting table for tool progression
offline_place_replan_feedback_grounding_.required_control: exclude the rejected place reference from the next strict-M4 replan, select at most one verifier-supplied adjacent candidate, and fail closed before action execution if the rejected reference repeats
